title: Perform mycology assays

pcs.text: Investigate role of microbiological organisms on tree and forest health

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse lifecycle, biology, ecology and effects of wood decay fungal species.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine relationship between fungal species and tree defects and failures.
